title: palala bivalvis
side_effects: Palala bivalvis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing excessive drowsiness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or overdose can lead to more severe reactions, including respiratory distress, seizures, and in rare cases, liver damage. The improper use of palala bivalvis can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and anti-anxiety medications, resulting in adverse effects. In addition, pregnant or breastfeeding women may be at a higher risk of experiencing side effects due to the plant's potential toxicity.
